title: Valley of the Moms
author: Angie Kim
pullQuote: "Basically Big Little Lies, one of my favorite shows, but make it Silicon Valley moms."
review: Read this on the flight to CDMX and finished it before we landed. It's got that Big Little Lies energy — gorgeous women, immaculate houses, and everyone hiding something — except it's set in a tech-bro playground instead of Monterey. The pacing is addictive, the reveals land, and I was texting friends screenshots the whole way through. Perfect poolside-slash-airport read.
